chunks.text: Migraine is a neurological disorder often associated with moderate to severe headache, nausea, photophobia and phonophobia.
chunks.title: Migraine Overview

chunks.text: Tension-type headache is usually described as a pressing or tightening pain of mild to moderate intensity without significant nausea.
chunks.title: Tension-Type Headache

chunks.text: Мигрень часто сопровождается тошнотой, светобоязнью и повышенной чувствительностью к звукам.
chunks.title: Мигрень
